role_villager_desc: You have no special powers. Try to find the werewolves and vote them out during the day!
role_werewolf_desc: Wake up at night with your pack to choose a victim. Hide your identity during the day!
role_seer_desc: Each night you can reveal one player's identity. Use your knowledge to guide the village!
role_witch_desc: You have two potions: life to save a victim, and death to kill another. Each usable once!
role_hunter_desc: When you die, you can take another player with you!
role_doctor_desc: Each night, protect one player from werewolf attacks.
role_thief_desc: At the start, you can swap your role with one of the unassigned cards.
role_fox_desc: Identify a group of 3. If a wolf is there, you'll know. If not, you lose your power.
role_cupid_desc: Choose two players to be lovers. If one dies, the other dies of heartbreak.
role_elder_desc: Survives the first werewolf attack. If killed by villagers, everyone loses their powers.
role_idiot_desc: If voted out, you are revealed and stay alive but lose your voting rights.
role_wild_child_desc: Choose a role model. If they die, you become a werewolf.
no_rooms: No rooms found. Make sure you're on the same Wi-Fi network.
